name: Blaze (BATMM)
description:
Blaze is the main character and protagonist of Blaze and the Monster Machines. He is a male Monster Machine who loves racing and adventure.


Blaze was introduced in the first episode, Blaze of Glory, along with his driver AJ. The two are practicing their tricks when upon using Blazing Speed, they accidentally ran into some falling rocks and were diverted off-course.


Finding Axle City and the Monster Dome, he meets Gabby the mechanic, as well as the other Monster Machines: Stripes, Starla, Darington and Zeg, as well as the cheating Crusher and his goofy sidekick Pickle. When attempting to stop Crusher after trapping the Monster Machines in Trouble Bubbles which carry them away from the Monster Machine World Championship, he gets caught in a bubble himself and is taken to a desert. Blaze moved to save and befriend the Monster Machines one by one, getting past Crusher's cheats and returning to the Monster Dome.


Once there, when Blaze wishes them luck, he is invited to participate in the race, which he happily accepts, making it his first race ever. He races with them, and when Crusher gets ahead, he uses his Blazing Speed to overtake him and win, thus winning the trophy and fulfilling his dream of becoming a Monster Machine racer.


Blaze continued to have many more adventures later on, whether it was to win a race, help a friend, finish a task, or for other reasons.


Blaze is a convertible monster truck based on multiple trophy trucks and pre-runners, specifically the first-generation 2010-2014 Ford F-150 SVT Raptor or even 2013-2014 STX and/or FX4. He is painted dull orange-red with gold lining on his hood filter. He has dark (sometimes bright) blue headlight-eyes, which set him apart from the other characters which have black eyes. He has a black grille also similar to the Raptor, except with the "FORD" lettering and orange marker lights removed, to avoid copyright issues. The shape of the grille also resembles more of a 2004-2008 Ford F-150 XL with a 2007-2013 Chevrolet Silverado's traditional horizontal single grille bar (non-split implies 1500 models). He even has a mix of fourth generation Chevrolet C/K/first generation GMC Sierra and 2008-2010/2011-2016 Ford Super Duty tail lights (albeit no reverse lights). and then-new 2015 Chevrolet Suburban, Tahoe, GMC Yukon/Yukon XL, and Cadillac Escalade/Escalade ESV wheel arches. He has four round lights on his roof edge, red springs on his shock absorbers, and his signature flame emblem on both sides of his doors and even on his steering wheel's horn (this may imply that Blaze could be either his own make or model name itself.). His tires have flame designs, and have red/gold rims. He also has a spoiler tucked into his middle back that retracts when his Blazing Speed is in use.
creator: Ammann_415
